{{Relic Infobox|History Course|2}}
'''History Course''' is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained from {{E|War Historian, Repy|2}} by selecting the {{Frame|Unlock the Cage}} option. {{C|Lantern Key||2}} must first be obtained from the [[Event]] with the same name; {{E|The Lantern Key|2}}.

== Spawn Restrictions==

== Interactions ==
===Synergies===
*'''History Course''' can potentially enable successive {{KW|Fatal||2}} kills (and resulting rewards therein) via a copied {{C|Feed||2}} or {{C|The Hunt||2}}, however this requires deliberate setup.
===Neutral===
*Because '''History Course''' creates a ''copy'' of a given card, benefits that card accrues do not translate over to its original version:
**A copied {{C|Thrash||2}}'s {{KW|Exhaust||2}} effect does not improve the original version's damage.
***In rare instances, the copied {{C|Thrash||2}} can {{KW|Exhaust||2}} the original.
**A copied {{KW|Goopy||2}} {{C|Defend (Ironclad)|Defend|2}} does not result in that {{C|Defend (Ironclad)|Defend|2}}'s {{KW|Block||2}} increasing permanently a second time (however the copied {{C|Defend (Ironclad)|Defend|2}} will feature its increased {{KW|Block||2}} count.).
**A copied {{C|The Scythe||2}} does ''not'' result in that {{C|The Scythe|Scythe|2}}'s damage increasing permanently a second time (however the copied {{C|The Scythe||2}} will feature its increased damage count.).
**Conversely, these interactions ''do'' work positively with {{C|Echo Form||2}} and {{P|Duplicator||2}} because they play cards a second time rather than make ''copies''.
*{{C|Stampede||2}} can potentially make it difficult to copy {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Skill|Skills|2}} via '''History Course'''.
*Cards copied via {{R|History Course||2}} will trigger {{BD|Echo Form||2}}.
=== Anti-Synergies ===
Cards that have a potentially detrimental effect if played as the last card of the turn:
*{{C|Fiend Fire||2}} exhausting your entire hand on the following turn.
*{{C|Primal Force||2}} transforming all attacks on the following turn.
*{{C|Stoke||2}} exhausting your entire hand on the following turn.
*{{C|Shadow Step||2}} discarding the entire hand on the following turn.
*{{C|Storm of Steel||2}} discarding the entire hand on the following turn.
*{{C|Eidolon||2}} exhausting your entire hand on the following turn.

== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.103.2'''
**BETA changes incorporated into main branch.
* '''Early Access v0.102.0 (BETA)'''
** When it plays a copy of an X-cost card, it now uses your current energy for its X-value instead of the energy spent the last time the card was played.
***Note: It still plays the copy for free.
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added History Course to the game.
